_comment: Office-friendly mermaid config: prioritises fonts with broad Unicode coverage (Cyrillic, CJK, Greek, math symbols) over mmdc's default Trebuchet MS, which has spotty non-Latin glyph coverage on Linux servers. Pass via md2pdf.py --mermaid-config to override or replace.
fontFamily: "Arial Unicode MS", "Noto Sans", "DejaVu Sans", "Liberation Sans", Arial, sans-serif

themeVariables.fontFamily: "Arial Unicode MS", "Noto Sans", "DejaVu Sans", "Liberation Sans", Arial, sans-serif
